title: Cajun Butter Shrimp and Sausage Skewers
Quick Beef Stir-Fry
ingredients: 1 pound beef sirloin, cut into 2-inch strips
1 red bell pepper, cut into matchsticks

title: Mom's Ground Turkey and Peppers
ingredients: 3 to 4 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
1 cup chopped yellow onion, including some chopped greens from scallions or green onions
Some chopped greens from green onions, if you have any
1 pound ground turkey, preferably ground turkey thighs
1 teaspoon chipotle powder or chili powder (or to taste)
2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley or cilantro

title: Mom's Roast Turkey
ingredients: Extra virgin olive oil or softened/melted butter
Several sprigs of fresh rosemary, sage, and/or thyme

title: Mom's Stovetop Turkey Stuffing
ingredients: Neck and giblets from 1 turkey to make a light stock (or 2 to 3 cups of chicken stock)
1 loaf day old French or Italian bread, cut into 3/4-inch cubes (about 10 to 12 cups)
5 chopped green pimento olives, pimento removed (can use up to 10 olives)
1 teaspoon poultry seasoning or ground sage, to taste
Salt and freshly ground pepper, to taste

title: Easiest Turkey Brine
ingredients: 1 (12- to 20-pound) turkey, not kosher, saline-injected, or otherwise pre-salted
5 large garlic cloves, peeled and smashed
250g kosher salt (1 cup Morton, or 1 3/4 cup Diamond Crystal, or 3/4 cup table salt), plus more if needed

title: Classic White Bean & Ham Soup
ingredients: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh thyme or 1 teaspoon dried

title: Ham & Broccoli Breakfast Casserole
ingredients: 4 cups frozen hash brown potatoes, thawed
6 ounces thinly sliced, lower-sodium cooked honey ham, chopped

title: Green Eggs & Ham Soup
ingredients: 4 ounces thick-cut ham or prosciutto, diced
0.25 cup chopped fresh parsley, plus more for garnish

title: Ham-&-Cheese-Stuffed Chicken Breasts
ingredients: 0.25 cup grated Swiss, Monterey Jack or part-skim mozzarella cheese
4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, (1-1 1/4 pounds total)

title: Smothered Cabbage with Ham
ingredients: 0.25 cup canola oil or avocado oil
2 medium Yukon Gold potatoes, cut into 1/2-inch chunks

title: Creamy White Bean Soup with Smoked Ham Hocks
ingredients: 2 (26-ounce) containers unsalted chicken stock (such as Swanson)

title: Baked Ham with Glaze
ingredients: 0.125 teaspoon ground cinnamon, or more to taste

title: Tangy Honey-Glazed Ham
ingredients: 0.333 cup honey, or more to taste
1.5 teaspoons lemon juice, or to taste

title: Ham with Honey and Brown Sugar Glaze
Perfect Pan-Seared Chicken Breasts
ingredients: 4 (6 ounce) skinless, boneless chicken breast halves

title: Chicken & Spinach Skillet Pasta with Lemon & Parmesan
ingredients: 8 ounces gluten-free penne pasta or whole-wheat penne pasta
1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs, trimmed, if necessary, and cut into bite-size pieces

title: Skillet Chicken Breast & Broccoli with Mustard-Rosemary Pan Sauce
ingredients: 2.5 cups broccoli florets (1 1/4-inch pieces) and sliced peeled stem (1 large head)
2 teaspoons chopped fresh rosemary or thyme, or 1/2 tsp. dried
1 teaspoon pure maple syrup or honey

title: Ground Beef & Pasta Skillet
ingredients: 8 ounces mushrooms, finely chopped or pulsed in a food processor
0.25 cup chopped fresh basil for garnish

title: Shrimp with Sun-Dried Tomato Cream Sauce
ingredients: 1 pound raw shrimp (26-30 count), peeled and deveined
.5 cup slivered oil-packed sun-dried tomatoes, plus 1 tablespoon oil from the jar

title: Tuna Salad Spread
ingredients: 1 (5 ounce) can albacore tuna in water, drained

title: Tuna Melt
ingredients: 2 5-ounce cans chunk light tuna (see Tip), drained

title: Crunchy Confetti Tuna Salad
ingredients: 1 teaspoon chopped fresh dill or 1/4 teaspoon dried
2 5-ounce cans chunk light tuna packed in olive oil, drained (see Tip)
0.25 cup coarsely chopped celery leaves or parsley

title: Chicken Sausage and Peppers
ingredients: 4 medium red, yellow, orange, and/or green sweet peppers, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 large sweet onion, cut into thin wedges
1 (12 ounce) package Italian-flavor cooked chicken sausage, such as Al Fresco brand, bias-sliced into thirds

title: Creamy Sausage & Cheese Tortellini Soup
ingredients: 1 pound mild or hot Italian pork sausage, casings removed
1 (15-ounce) can no-salt-added diced tomatoes with basil, garlic and oregano, undrained
1 (9-ounce) package refrigerated cheese tortellini (such as Buitoni)

title: Chicken Sausage & Spinach Skillet Pasta with Lemon & Parmesan
ingredients: 1 (11 ounce) package cooked chicken sausage, sliced
2 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into pieces

title: Sausage, Potato & Kale Soup
ingredients: 8 ounces mild Italian sausage, casings removed
1.5 cups chopped celery, plus leaves for garnish
3 cups stemmed and coarsely chopped kale

title: One-Pot Garlicky Shrimp & Broccoli
ingredients: 1 pound peeled and deveined raw shrimp (21-30 count)
2 teaspoons lemon juice, plus more to taste

title: Super Quick Low-Carb Shrimp Scampi
ingredients: 1.25 pounds large (16-20 count) peeled and deveined raw shrimp
1 teaspoon lemon zest plus 2 Tbsp. fresh juice (from 1 medium lemon)

title: Seared Tuna with Bulgur & Chickpea Salad
ingredients: 1 pound tuna, cut into 4 steaks (see Tip)

title: Sheet-Pan Sausage & Peppers
ingredients: 1 small (5 1/2 ounce) red onion, sliced (1 1/4 cups)
1 medium red bell pepper, sliced (1 cup)
1 medium orange bell pepper, sliced (1 cup)
1 medium yellow bell pepper, sliced (1 cup)
1 cup thinly sliced fennel (from 1 small fennel bulb)
1 (12 ounce) package Italian-style smoked chicken sausage (such as Aidells)

title: One-Pot Spinach, Chicken Sausage & Feta Pasta
ingredients: 3 links cooked chicken sausage (9 ounces), sliced into rounds
4 cups lightly packed baby spinach (half of a 5-ounce box)
¼ cup water, plus more as needed

title: Slow-Cooker Kale & Sausage Stew
ingredients: 0.25 cup finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley

title: Easy Provençal Lamb
ingredients: 1 (6- to 7-pound) bone-in leg of lamb, trimmed and tied
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
3 pounds ripe red tomatoes, cored and 1-inch diced
Note: You'll want to use a liquid—rather than a solid—honey for this recipe so it can be drizzled on the lamb.

title: Herb-Crusted Rack of Lamb
ingredients: 2 (8-rib) frenched racks of lamb (each rack 1½ lb.), trimmed of all but a thin layer of fat
1¼ tsp. freshly ground black pepper, divided
½ head new garlic or 3 large regular garlic cloves, minced
¼ cup finely chopped fresh parsley

title: Saddle of Lamb
ingredients: 1 saddle of lamb (also known as the double loin or double rack), excess fat and long, flat flank sections removed, saddle rolled and tied
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

title: Rack of Lamb
ingredients: 4 1- to 1 1/2-pound racks of lamb, trimmed of all but a 1/4-inch layer of fat and frenched (each rack should have 8 ribs)
3 cups Jack’s Old South Original Rub, or 1 recipe Basic Barbecue Rub (page 20)

title: Grilled Leg of Lamb With Lemon-Garlic Marinade
ingredients: ¼ cup freshly squeezed lemon juice plus more lemons, halved, for serving
2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt
1 (4½–5 lb.) butterflied boneless leg of lamb, trimmed of fat
Special Equipment: A large (2-gallon) heavy-duty sealable plastic bag; 3 or 4 (10–12-inch) metal skewers

title: Roast Baby Lamb
ingredients: 5-pound baby lamb shoulder with bone, cut into 2" cubes

title: Lamb Chops with Rosemary and Garlic
ingredients: 4 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil, divided

title: Classic Rack of Lamb
ingredients: 1 or more Frenched* lamb rib racks with 7 to 8 ribs each (1 1/4 to 2 pounds for each rack, figure each rack feeds 2-3 people)

title: Lamb Curry
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless (or 3 pounds bone-in), lamb stew meat, lamb shanks, and/or lamb shoulder steaks
2-3 tablespoons ghee (clarified butter), or 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil with 1 tablespoon butter
2 slices of lemon, with rind (use 3 slices if using Meyer lemons)
2 peeled and chopped apples, preferably tart green Granny Smith apples (about 2 cups)

title: Roast Leg of Lamb
ingredients: 2 teaspoons fresh thyme (or 1 teaspoon dried thyme)
2 tablespoon fresh chopped rosemary (or 1 tablespoon dried rosemary)
1 (6-pound) leg of lamb, bone-in or boneless (A boneless leg should be tied up with kitchen twine by a butcher.)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

title: Lamb Shank Stew with Root Vegetables
ingredients: 3 pounds of lamb shanks, each shank cut into a couple of pieces
4 carrots, 2 coarsely chopped, 2 cut into 2-inch segments, and quartered lengthwise
1 medium rutabaga, roughly chopped (1 1/2 inch pieces)
1 medium turnip, roughly sliced or chopped (1 inch pieces)
2 cloves of garlic, peeled and minced

title: Basque Lamb Stew
ingredients: 3 1/2 pounds lamb shoulder, cut into 2 inch pieces
1 sprig fresh rosemary, about 1 tablespoon chopped
1 10-ounce can roasted red bell peppers, cut into 1/2 inch strips
1 large ripe tomato, peeled, seeded, and chopped

title: Pesto Salmon
ingredients: 1/3 c. olive oil, plus more for the pan
Juice from half a lemon, plus wedges for serving
1/2 tsp. black pepper, plus more to taste

title: Baked Salmon
ingredients: Chopped fresh parsley, dill, or chives, for garnish

title: Grilled Salmon
ingredients: 1 1/2 tsp. kosher salt, plus more to finish

title: Honey Soy Salmon
ingredients: 2 (6-8oz.) salmon fillets (skin on or off, whatever your preference)
2 tbsp. lime juice, plus more for the rice

title: Salmon Tacos
ingredients: 2 tbsp. olive oil, plus more for the baking sheet
Grated zest and juice of 2 limes, plus wedges for serving
1 1/2 lb. center-cut salmon (in one piece), skin removed
Sliced avocado and thinly sliced radishes, for topping

title: Apple Cider-Glazed Salmon
ingredients: Vegetable oil, for the baking dish
1 1/2 tsp. freshly grated ginger (from a 3/4-inch piece)

title: Salmon Tacos with Charred Corn Slaw
ingredients: 2 tsp. chili powder, plus more to taste
1 1/2 tsp. kosher salt, plus more to taste
1 tsp. black pepper, plus more to taste
2 tbsp. vegetable oil, plus more for the baking sheet
1 1/2 lb. piece center-cut salmon, skin removed
4 ears corn, kernels cut off the cobs (or 3 c. frozen kernels)
3 green onions, thinly sliced, whites and greens separated
1/4 small head red cabbage, finely shredded (about 2 c.)

title: Chipotle Caesar Salad with Grilled Salmon
ingredients: 1 9-ounce loaf ciabatta bread, cut into 1-inch cubes
1/2 c. plus 2 tablespoons grated parmesan cheese
1/4 c. plus 2 tablespoons adobo sauce (from a can of chipotles)

title: One-Pot Garlicky Shrimp & Spinach
ingredients: 1 pound shrimp (21-30 count), peeled and deveined

title: Summer Shrimp Salad
ingredients: 1.25 pounds raw shrimp (21-25 count), peeled and deveined
0.5 cup chopped fresh basil, plus more for garnish

title: Greek Yogurt Tuna Salad
ingredients: 0.25 cup 2% plain strained yogurt, such as Greek-style
2 Unit (3 oz.) pouches solid white tuna in water (such as Wild Planet No Salt Added Albacore Wild Tuna)
1 cup loosely-packed microgreens (such as radish or basil)

title: The Best Tuna Salad Recipe for Sandwiches
ingredients: 1 5-ounce can no-salt light tuna in water, drained
3 tablespoons low-fat plain strained yogurt, such as Greek-style
1 tablespoon finely chopped herbs, such as parsley, dill or chives

title: 10-Minute Tuna Melt
ingredients: 2 tablespoons chopped jarred roasted red pepper

title: Cauliflower Hash with Sausage & Eggs
ingredients: 16 ounces cauliflower rice (4 cups; see Tip)

title: Ground Beef & Potatoes Skillet
ingredients: 1 bunch lacinato kale, stemmed and roughly chopped
1 (15-oz.) can unsalted fire roasted diced tomatoes, undrained

title: Teriyaki Ground Beef Skillet
ingredients: freshly ground black pepper to taste
